title: Scroll-Driven Animations
description: Create scroll-driven animations using the scroll-timeline and view-timeline APIs to animate elements as they enter and scroll through the viewport
html:
Scroll to Reveal

This text fades in as you scroll down.

validationRules.message: Progress bar should be fixed positioned
Progress bar track should be light gray
Progress bar should have high z-index
Scroll demo should be tall enough to scroll

hints.text: Scroll-driven animations replace JavaScript scroll handlers with pure CSS. animation-timeline: scroll() links to scroll position; view() links to element visibility.
Create a @keyframes for the progress bar (0-100% width). Set animation-timeline: scroll() on it. For reveals, use animation-timeline: view() with animation-range: entry.
Use scroll() timeline for progress bar, view() timeline for element reveals.
